description_en: Siem Reap may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 11 halal restaurants and 3 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Siem Reap, Cambodia, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Siem Reap: 11+ halal restaurants, 3 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.1/5.
